problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: If Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts is applied to —, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
